fa-square-dashed.appearanceId: square outline drawn with a dashed or dotted border instead of a solid line; rectangular frame composed of evenly spaced dash segments
fa-square-dashed.functionalityId: marks or outlines a selection area with a dashed boundary; defines a placeholder or drop-target zone
fa-square-dashed.intentId: indicate a selection region, placeholder, or drop zone with a dashed border; define an unfilled or pending area in a layout

fa-square-dashed-circle-plus.appearanceId: dashed-border square outline with a small circle containing a plus sign overlaid at one corner; dotted rectangular frame with an add-circle badge
fa-square-dashed-circle-plus.functionalityId: adds a new item or element into a dashed placeholder area; creates a new entry within a dotted selection zone
fa-square-dashed-circle-plus.intentId: add a new item to a placeholder or empty slot; insert content into an unoccupied dashed region

fa-square-divide.appearanceId: square container enclosing an obelus division symbol with a dot above and a dot below a horizontal bar; box outline with a divide arithmetic glyph inside
fa-square-divide.functionalityId: performs or represents a division operation in a calculator or math interface; inserts the division operator symbol
fa-square-divide.intentId: perform a division calculation; insert or indicate a divide operation in a math or calculator interface

fa-square-down.appearanceId: square container enclosing a downward-pointing arrow centered inside; box outline with a vertical arrow pointing toward the bottom edge
fa-square-down.functionalityId: moves or downloads content downward within a square control; collapses or scrolls content in a downward direction
fa-square-down.intentId: scroll down or download content using a square directional button; navigate downward within a bounded interface element

fa-square-down-left.appearanceId: square container enclosing a diagonal arrow pointing toward the lower-left corner; box outline with an arrow aimed at the bottom-left
fa-square-down-left.functionalityId: moves or navigates content toward the lower-left within a square control; shifts an element diagonally down and to the left
fa-square-down-left.intentId: navigate or move content diagonally toward the lower-left; reposition an element in the down-left direction within a bounded area

fa-square-down-right.appearanceId: square container enclosing a diagonal arrow pointing toward the lower-right corner; box outline with an arrow aimed at the bottom-right
fa-square-down-right.functionalityId: moves or navigates content toward the lower-right within a square control; shifts an element diagonally down and to the right
fa-square-down-right.intentId: navigate or move content diagonally toward the lower-right; reposition an element in the down-right direction within a bounded area

fa-square-e.functionalityId: labels or represents an item beginning with E in a square badge; marks an E-category entry or keyboard shortcut
fa-square-e.intentId: identify or tag an E-labeled item or section; use as a keyboard shortcut badge or alphabetical category marker for E

fa-square-ellipsis.appearanceId: square container enclosing three horizontally arranged dots centered inside; box outline with a horizontal ellipsis glyph

fa-square-ellipsis.intentId: access additional options or overflow actions from a square button; reveal a hidden menu or context actions

fa-square-ellipsis-vertical.intentId: access a vertical overflow menu or additional actions from a square button; reveal a vertical context menu in a bounded control
